title: Velvety Adventurous Tangy Pepper Stir-fry
description: A tangy and velvety Polish dish featuring shortcrust pastry in a slow-cooked pepper sauce that is both adventurous and halal-friendly.
instructions: Prepare the bell peppers by removing stems and seeds. Slice them into strips.
Heat vegetable oil in a large skillet over medium heat. Add onion and garlic, sauté until translucent.
Add pepper strips and continue cooking for about 5 minutes, stirring occasionally.
Stir in tomato paste and chili flakes. Cook for another minute.
Fold in the sheet of shortcrust pastry into the skillet mixture. Pour water over everything to cover completely.
Cover with foil or a lid, place in preheated oven, and cook for about 30-45 minutes until done.
Serve hot as an adventurous yet flavorful dish.
